bench_setup.notes: DMA-driven USART1 loopback. DMA1_CH4(TX via DMAMUX req 25) sends 8 bytes; DMA1_CH5(RX via DMAMUX req 24) receives them. Firmware compares TX/RX buffers and reports PASS/FAIL via mailbox. Requires PA9↔PA10 loopback wire (existing bench wiring). Error codes: 0xE001=timeout, 0xE002=mismatch, 0xE003=DMA transfer error.

peripheral_signals.notes: USART1 RX, AF7. DMA1_CH5 (DMAMUX request 24). Loopback: PA9→PA10.
